title: Molten Veins
description: Mine smarter, not harder! Auto-smelts ores into ingots and lets you vein mine entire ore clusters with a single block break.
body:
# Molten Veins

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ZPXPEXdQQ9)

Tired of hauling raw ore back to your furnace? **Molten Veins** skips the wait and drops ingots straight into your inventory when you mine iron, gold, copper, or ancient debris.

But that's not all, hold your vein mine key and break one ore block to shatter the entire connected vein. Up to 256 blocks at once, all auto-smelted if applicable.

## ✨ Features

- **Auto-Smelt**: Mine ore, get ingots instantly (iron, gold, copper, ancient debris, clay)
- **Vein Mining**: Break entire ore veins with one block (works with ALL ores + hay bales + clay + obsidian!)
- **Silk Touch Support**: Silk Touch bypasses auto-smelt and drops ore blocks as expected
- **Fortune Support**: Auto-smelting respects fortune enchantment for bonus drops
- **XP Bonus**: Random 1-4x XP multiplier to compensate for skipped furnace XP
- **Magnet Mode**: Drops loot directly to your inventory
- **Custom Config UI**: Press Z for a fully custom-drawn settings screen with orange-themed design, toggle switches, item icons, and smooth animations
- **Per-Block Toggles**: Enable/disable each block type individually
- **Rebindable Keys**: Change hotkeys in Minecraft's controls menu

## ⌨️ Controls

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Left Alt | Vein Mine (hold while mining) |
| Z | Open Settings |

Both keys can be changed in Options → Controls → Molten Veins

## 📦 Supported Blocks

Coal, Diamond, Iron, Gold, Copper, Emerald, Lapis, Redstone, Quartz, Ancient Debris, Nether Gold Ore, Hay Bale, Clay, Obsidian, plus all deepslate variants!

## ⚙️ Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.8+
- Fabric Loader 0.18.3+
- Fabric API
- Can be used on **both client and server**

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Feature Requests

Found a bug or want a new feature? Join the Discord and let us know!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Report%20Issues%20%26%20Suggest%20Features-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ZPXPEXdQQ9)
